name: Amgen Inc.
lede: Amgen runs three capability centers across three Indian cities. Hyderabad, Mumbai and Bengaluru, covering it and R&D, built over nineteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Amgen office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Amgen Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Amgen runs 3 verified GCC centers across 3 Indian cities (Hyderabad, Mumbai, Bengaluru), covering it and R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: HEAD – WORKPLACE STRATEGY, FACILITIES & SITE OPERATIONS |
Associate Director - Total Rewards, HR Operations and Payroll

about.description: Amgen's India footprint covers Hyderabad, Mumbai and Bengaluru, spanning it and R&D. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D and Procurement for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Biopharmaceuticals and Biotherapeutics, Biotechnology and Life Sciences

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 29 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Amgen operate in India?
faq.a: Amgen operates 3 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Amgen have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Amgen's India GCC footprint spans Hyderabad, Mumbai and Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Amgen run in India?
faq.a: Amgen runs it and R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Amgen's India GCCs?
faq.a: Amgen's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Amgen's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 29 leaders at Amgen's India centers, across IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
